title: bauhinia angulosa var. meridionalis
intro: Bauhinia angulosa var. meridionalis is a plant species belonging to the family Fabaceae, native to Southeast Asia, and is used in traditional medicine. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits associated with Bauhinia angulosa var. meridionalis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant are often used in the form of decoctions, infusions, or extracts, which are used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions.
